subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Render praise unto the Beloved of all worlds, that through His grace thou hast entered the Divine Law and partaken of the outpourings of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن محبوب عالمیان را که بعنایت او بشریعه احدیه وارد شدی و بفیوضات رحمانیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
